lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Exile. You don't have many friends around here at the moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you feel about it?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Doesn't bother me. Some people take these things more seriously than others. On that note, do you need something?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have some more boots?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Thorodin, taskmaster for the Fremennik Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In the Fremennik lands it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In the Fremennik lands it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Well, there are four different pairs of Fremennik sea boots, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: would you like to know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks in the Fremennik Province, Peer the Seer can bank items for you at all times and your enchanted lyre can hold an extra charge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards, your boots can teleport you to Rellekka once per day as well as an increased rate of gaining approval with your subjects.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, you'll be able to change your lyre teleport location to Waterbirth Island, access two new Lunar spells and you'll receive extra Agility experience from the Rellekka rooftop

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, your boots now have unlimited teleports to Rellekka, your lyre can be attuned to teleport you to Jatiszo or Neitiznot, you'll no longer need a seal of passage on Lunar Isle,

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Dagannoth bones will be dropped as notes and your subjects will approve of your kingdom management even faster than before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Just complete the tasks in the Fremennik Province so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About the Dagannoth Kings...

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Ah, yes. Because you've completed the elite tasks for the Fremennik Province, their bones will be noted for you.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: If you'd prefer, I can change it so they will drop their bones as they normally would?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Very well. In future, when you kill a Dagannoth King, they will drop their bones normally.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Very well. If you change your mind, come talk to me again.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Ah, yes. You wanted the bones from the Dagannoth Kings to remain unnoted when you killed them.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: If you'd prefer, I can change them back to being noted instead?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Very well. In future, when you kill a Dagannoth King, their bones will be noted.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Very well. If you change your mind, come talk to me again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Fremennik Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: These boots are a symbol of your exploration of the Fremennik lands. They can teleport you here once per day, Peer the Seer can now bank items for you at all times and your enchanted lyre can hold an extra

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: charge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: If you ever lose your boots, come back to me to reclaim them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Fremennik achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: I've upgraded your Fremennik sea boots for you. They can now teleport you here three times per day and have an increased rate of gaining approval with your subjects.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Fremennik achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: You need to complete all of the easy and medium tasks too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: I've upgraded your Fremennik sea boots for you. They can now teleport you here five times per day, you can now change your lyre teleport location to Waterbirth Island, access two new Lunar spells and you'll receive

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: extra Agility experience from the Rellekka rooftop course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Fremennik achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Fremennik Province! Here's your reward!

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: I've upgraded your Fremennik sea boots for you. In addition to all of the previous benefits, your boots now have unlimited teleports to Rellekka, your lyre can now teleport you to Jatiszo or Neitiznot, you'll no longer

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: need a seal of passage on Lunar Isle, Dagannoth bones will be dropped as notes and your subjects will approve of your kingdom management even faster than before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
